seoTitle: Old Station vs Olinda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Old Station and Olinda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Old Station vs Olinda: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Station and Olinda.
heading: Old Station vs Olinda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Station, New South Wales and Olinda, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Station has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Olinda (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Station or Olinda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Station has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Olinda scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Station scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Olinda scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Station or Olinda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Station has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
